arts.ttl: Celtic deadline day flop mirrors Arsenal, what Mikel Arteta said about striker failure should resonate with Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: But Celts are not the only club who were unable to do their ideal business in January and that is where Arsenal and Mikel Arteta circles back around. Celtic failed to land a deadline day striker

arts.ttl: Boss of Celtic transfer target opens door to move in the summer
arts.sum: Boss of Celtic transfer target opens door to move in the summer.

arts.ttl: Mathias Kvistgaarden lowball Celtic transfer bids destined to fail as David Strelec's head in a mess with interest
arts.sum: Kvistgaarden proved too expensive but David Strelec has been tipped for. bigger things than Middlesbrough amid Celtic links

arts.ttl: Adam Idah shares how he really feels about Celtic failing to replace Kyogo on transfer deadline day
arts.sum: Idah was asked how he feels about now being Celtic’s main striker after the departure of Kyogo and whilst he’s happy with his new status, the big Irishman namechecked one of his teammates who’s ‘flying’ to a job for the Parkhead club. Idah told Celtic TV, “Nice for me that potentially I’ve got a lot more game time in my hands, but at the end of the day it’s not my decision whether the club signs a striker or not.

arts.ttl: Celtic hero Scott Brown issues Ayr United response to Motherwell job
arts.sum: Celtic hero Scott Brown has ruled himself out of the running for the vacant Motherwell job.

arts.ttl: The key Champions League rule as Celtic UEFA deadline approaches
arts.sum: The key Champions League squad rule as Celtic UEFA deadline approaches

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers says Celtic coaching staff see 'real difference' in Bhoys star who will now play more
arts.sum: That’s because Celtic didn’t acquire the players needed, even though Rodgers was clear that a striker was needed after Kyogo Furuhashi’s exit . Kenny was on-loan at Shamrock Rovers, where he netted a high volume of goals and also competed in Europe.

arts.ttl: The incredible Rangers rejection of Daizen Maeda as Ross Wilson filleted for 'absolutely bonkers' snub
arts.sum: The 27-year-old has been outstanding signing for the Hoops but could he have ended up on at Ibrox?

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers talks up player Celtic already have who can play 'way above Kyogo's levels'
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers had already made his feelings perfectly clear that he wanted to replace the Japanese icon but as the Hoops transfer window panned out, the club failed to get that player in. However, it seems that the Parkhead club may have a backup plan as Rodgers says Celtic already have a player he can use to fill in the Kyogo role, but only if he has to.
